title: Etsy Full Year 2024 Earnings: EPS Beats Expectations
text: Etsy reported full-year 2024 results with mixed outcomes. The company generated revenue of $2.81 billion, representing modest growth of 2.2% year-over-year. Net income declined slightly to $303.3 million, down 1.4% from the prior year, while the profit margin remained steady at 11%. The standout metric was earnings per share. Etsy delivered an EPS of $2.64, which surpassed analyst estimates by 4.1%. This performance exceeded expectations despite revenue aligning with analyst forecasts. Looking ahead, the company faces a growth challenge relative to its sector. Etsy's projected revenue growth of 5.5% annually over the next three years lags the broader Multiline Retail industry forecast of 9.5% expansion in the United States. Following the earnings announcement, Etsy shares declined 2.4% within a week.
